shareMessageIntro: Join me on CAP — Cardano Analytics Platform

cap.headline: Welcome to CAP: Cardano Analytics Powered by AI
cap.lead: Simplifying Cardano blockchain data exploration through natural language, bridging complex on-chain data with user-friendly insights via a custom LLM and a Semantic Knowledge Graph.

cta.title: Ready to explore Cardano data the fast way?
cta.description: Sign in above to access your workspace and start pinning insights.

pillars.title: Our Roadmap: The Three Pillars of Innovation

llm.title: Cardano-tailored LLM Pipeline
llm.desc: A specialized AI reasoning engine trained to understand Cardano’s domain-specific data structures, ontologies, and governance mechanics.

kg.title: Cardano Knowledge Graph
kg.desc: A semantic source of truth linking on-chain activity with off-chain metadata for holistic, contextual blockchain analysis.

dashboards.title: User-Centric Smart Dashboards
dashboards.desc: Interactive, customizable workspaces where users pin AI-generated charts and tables for real-time monitoring and exploration.

step1.title: Ask in Natural Language
step1.desc: Users can input blockchain queries using everyday language — no SQL or SPARQL required.

step2.title: Semantic Translation
step2.desc: CAP’s AI translates your human question into precise, executable SPARQL queries over the Cardano knowledge graph.

step3.title: Instant Visual Results
step3.desc: Results are automatically rendered into interactive Vega-Lite charts or structured tables.

examples.body: Examples of advanced queries the platform targets
examples.title: Our Target: Complex and Advanced Queries Made Easy

items.query: List top 5 meme tokens by volume
Compare voter turnout by proposal label

footer.tagline: Building advanced data and AI infrastructure for decentralized ecosystems.

beta.title: Join the CAP Closed Beta
beta.lead: Explore Cardano data with AI-powered analytics, natural language queries, and interactive dashboards.
beta.description: CAP is opening a limited closed beta for selected users who want to test a clearer way to analyze Cardano data. The platform combines structured blockchain data, knowledge graphs, and AI reasoning to move from raw on-chain information to practical insights.

nl.title: Natural Language Discovery
nl.desc: Ask questions about Cardano in plain English and retrieve structured analytics.

dashboards.title: AI-Powered Dashboards
dashboards.desc: Pin generated charts and tables into a personal analytics workspace.

federated.title: Federated Data Intelligence
federated.desc: Explore a unified view across on-chain activity and essential off-chain metadata.

audience.title: Who should apply
audience.desc: We are looking for users willing to test, give feedback, and help shape the next version of CAP.

form.title: Register your interest
form.subtitle: Tell us how you would use CAP. We will use this to prioritize beta invitations.
form.name: Name
form.useCase: What would you like to test?
form.useCasePlaceholder: Example: staking analytics, governance monitoring, token dashboards, research workflows...
form.note: Closed beta access is limited while we test the product with early users.
form.successToast: Registration received. We will review it and follow up by email.
form.error: Could not submit your registration. Please try again.

betaBadge.text: Interested in early access? Register your interest.
betaBadge.aria: Open the CAP closed beta registration page

analyses.title: My Analyses
analyses.subtitle: Browse your conversations on a dedicated view.
analyses.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, preview, or id…
analyses.accessDeniedText: Please log in to view your analyses.

landing.emptySubtitle: Query the Cardano blockchain using natural language. Ask about transactions, blocks, stake pools, governance, or any on-chain data.
landing.unexpectedError: Unexpected error while processing your query.

emptyRotating.2: Plot a chart of monthly NFT minting activity in December 2025
emptyRotating.3: How much of the ADA supply is held by the top 1%?
emptyRotating.4: Show the latest governance proposals and their IPFS links

admin.billingSectionSubtitle: Review user plans, access status, balances, quota usage, premium expiration, and latest payments.
admin.billingSearchPlaceholder: Search by email, username, display name, or wallet…
admin.billingNoRows: No billing access records found for this query.
admin.billingGrantPremiumPrompt: How many Premium days should be granted or added?
admin.billingInvalidDays: Enter a valid number of days.
admin.billingConfirmRevokePremium: Revoke active Premium access for this user?
admin.billingConfirmResetQuota: Reset this user's free query usage for the current period?
admin.billingAdjustBalancePrompt: Enter the amount to add or subtract. Use negative values to remove balance.
admin.billingBalanceAdaHelp: Use a positive amount to add Balance or a negative amount to remove Balance.
admin.billingGrantPremiumModalBody: Grant or extend Premium access for this user. If the user already has active Premium, the selected number of days is added after the current expiration.
admin.billingRevokePremiumModalBody: Revoke active Premium access for this user. This will mark the current active Premium entitlement as revoked.
admin.billingResetQuotaModalBody: Reset this user's free query usage for the current period back to zero.
admin.billingAdjustBalanceModalBody: Adjust this user's CAP Balance. This creates a ledger entry and updates the account balance.
admin.billingOverviewSubtitle: High-level metrics about Premium access, free-query limits, and user balances.
admin.billingOverviewBlockedUsersCaption: Users who reached the free query limit
admin.billingOverviewTotalBalanceCaption: Prepaid CAP Balance held by users
admin.billingOverviewFreeQuotaUsedCaption: Free queries used in the current period
admin.billingStatsBlockedShownCaption: Users who reached the free query limit
admin.billingNotificationsSubtitle: Control which billing and access lifecycle emails are sent to users. These settings are stored in the database and apply immediately.
admin.billingNotificationsDefaultFlowCaption: Deposits notify only after Balance is credited.

payment_session_created.title: Payment session created
payment_session_created.description: Send when a user creates a pending Cardano payment session. Usually disabled to avoid extra emails.

payment_confirmed.title: Generic payment confirmed
payment_confirmed.description: Send a generic confirmation when a Cardano payment is verified. Usually disabled when a more specific final email is enabled.

payment_failed.title: Payment verification failed
payment_failed.description: Send when a submitted transaction cannot be verified or does not match the expected payment.

balance_credited.title: CAP Balance credited
balance_credited.description: Send after a successful deposit is credited to the user’s CAP Balance.

premium_activated.title: Premium activated
premium_activated.description: Send when Premium access is newly activated after payment or Balance use.

premium_extended.title: Premium extended
premium_extended.description: Send when an existing Premium entitlement is extended.

support_contribution_confirmed.title: Support contribution confirmed
support_contribution_confirmed.description: Send after a support or donation payment is confirmed.

auto_renew_enabled.title: Auto-renewal enabled
auto_renew_enabled.description: Send when a user enables Balance-funded Premium auto-renewal.

auto_renew_disabled.title: Auto-renewal disabled
auto_renew_disabled.description: Send when a user disables Balance-funded Premium auto-renewal.

auto_renew_succeeded.title: Auto-renewal succeeded
auto_renew_succeeded.description: Send when Premium is renewed automatically from CAP Balance.

auto_renew_failed.title: Auto-renewal failed
auto_renew_failed.description: Send when auto-renewal cannot complete, for example because Balance is insufficient.

admin_premium_granted.title: Admin granted Premium
admin_premium_granted.description: Send when an admin grants or extends Premium access for a user.

admin_premium_revoked.title: Admin revoked Premium
admin_premium_revoked.description: Send when an admin revokes Premium access for a user.

admin_balance_adjusted.title: Admin adjusted Balance
admin_balance_adjusted.description: Send when an admin adds or removes CAP Balance for a user.

admin.dataConsoleSubtitle: Admin-only tools for raw SPARQL, graph operations, and cache administration.
admin.dataConsoleSparqlSubtitle: Execute direct SPARQL read queries against the configured triplestore.
admin.dataConsoleGraphReadSubtitle: Read triples from a named graph URI.
admin.dataConsoleGraphWriteSubtitle: Create a graph from Turtle data, patch triples, or delete a graph.
admin.dataConsoleConfirmDeleteGraph: Delete graph {{graphUri}}? This cannot be undone.
admin.dataConsoleCacheSubtitle: Inspect, clear, and pre-cache natural-language query mappings.
admin.dataConsoleConfirmClearCache: Clear all NL query cache entries?
admin.dataConsoleResultSubtitle: Responses are shown as formatted JSON for inspection.
admin.dataConsoleNoResult: No operation has been executed yet.
admin.dataConsoleGraphUnifiedSubtitle: Read, create, update, or delete named graphs from one controlled admin workspace.
admin.dataConsoleDependencyUnavailableHint: This usually means Redis or another local backend dependency is not running. The UI request path and admin auth can still be considered valid if the request reached the backend.
admin.dataConsoleLongRunning: {{action}} is still running. This may happen locally when Redis/QLever is unavailable or when the uploaded mapping file is large.
admin.dataConsoleRequestTimeout: The admin operation timed out before the backend returned a response.
admin.dataConsoleUploadTimeout: The upload/pre-cache operation is taking too long. If Redis is unavailable locally, the backend may still be retrying many cache entries.
admin.dataConsoleInlineIdle: Ready. Run an admin operation to see the latest response here.
admin.dataConsoleUploadRunningTooltip: Upload/pre-cache is taking longer than usual. In local dev this usually means Redis/QLever is unavailable or the mapping file is large.
admin.dataConsoleLongRunningToast: {{action}} is taking longer than usual. In local dev this may happen when Redis/QLever is unavailable or the uploaded file is large.

betaProgram.subtitle: Track registrations, activity, and notifications for the beta program.
betaProgram.registrationsSubtitle: Manage status, notes, and linked CAP accounts.

betaProgram.queryNotificationsHelp: Email admins when any CAP user submits a new query. This is global and not limited to beta users.
betaProgram.autoRefreshHelp: This tab refreshes in the background while visible and avoids overlapping requests.
betaProgram.activityHint: Activity is linked by registration email → CAP account → submitted queries.
betaProgram.selectRecipientsFirst: Select at least one recipient before sending a test email.
betaProgram.inviteError: Could not send the beta invitation.
betaProgram.removeConfirm: Remove the registration for {{email}}? This does not remove the linked CAP account.
betaProgram.betaQueryNotificationsHelp: Email admins only when a query is submitted by a user whose e-mail is registered in the beta program.

storageRequired.title: Storage is blocked
storageRequired.body: CAP needs browser storage (cookies/local storage) to keep you signed in. Please enable storage for this site, disable strict privacy mode, or free up storage space, then reload.

modal.title: Activate CAP Premium
modal.subtitle: Pay securely with your connected Cardano wallet. Balance-based renewal is coming next.
modal.success: Payment verified. Premium access is now active.
modal.note: The payment amount and address are generated by CAP before the transaction is built. Access is granted only after backend verification.

benefits.unlimitedQueries: Unlock unlimited natural-language analytics queries during the active 30-day period.
benefits.premiumAnalytics: Access premium dashboard generation and on-chain analysis workflows.
benefits.walletNative: Pay directly from your Cardano wallet, no account handoff.
benefits.prepaidRenewals: Use your balance for future premium renewals.
benefits.payAsYouGoReady: Prepared for upcoming pay-as-you-go query usage.
benefits.supportKnowledgeGraphs: Helps maintain knowledge graph and AI tooling

modal.depositSubtitle: Fund your CAP account for future renewals and pay-as-you-go analytics.
modal.supportSubtitle: Help fund open analytics infrastructure for Cardano.
modal.supportNote: This is a voluntary contribution. It does not add Balance or activate Premium.

errors.walletRequired: Connect a Cardano wallet before starting payment.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.txNotFound: Transaction was submitted but is not indexed yet. Please wait a few seconds and try again if needed.
errors.insufficientPaymentAmount: The transaction did not include the required amount.
errors.paymentSessionExpired: This payment session expired. Start a new one.
errors.walletChangeAddressMissing: Wallet did not return a valid change address.
errors.unsupportedCardanoNetwork: This Cardano network is not supported for payment.
errors.noSpendableUtxos: This wallet has no spendable UTxOs. Add funds to this wallet or choose another wallet.
errors.insufficientWalletBalance: Insufficient wallet balance. Available: {{balance}}. Required: {{required}} including an estimated fee buffer.
errors.walletBalanceUnavailable: Wallet balance is not available. Make sure the wallet is unlocked and connected.
errors.walletSignTxUnavailable: This wallet does not support transaction signing.
errors.walletSubmitTxUnavailable: This wallet does not support transaction submission.
errors.txInputBuildFailed: Could not build the transaction from this wallet UTxO set. Try refreshing the wallet, switching accounts, or using another wallet.
errors.unsupportedTransactionBuilder: This Cardano transaction builder version is not supported by the current payment flow.
errors.creditDepositTooSmall: Deposit amount is below the minimum.
errors.creditDepositTooLarge: Deposit amount is above the maximum.
errors.walletLocked: Please unlock your Cardano wallet and try again.

settingsBilling.title: Billing & Access

settingsBilling.prepaidDescription: Deposit ₳DA now and use it later for renewals or pay-as-you-go analytics.

settingsBilling.futureAutoRenew: Auto-renew from Balance is now available

explore.label: Explore
explore.hint: Start with a practical balance for testing CAP workflows.

analyze.label: Analyze
analyze.hint: A useful balance for repeated analytics sessions.

build.label: Build
build.hint: More room for dashboards, saved outputs, and deeper analysis.

scale.label: Scale
scale.hint: More runway for active research and recurring workflows.

operate.label: Operate
operate.hint: Designed for sustained analysis cycles and power usage.

settingsBilling.supportDisclaimer: Voluntary contribution. This does not add Balance or activate Premium.
settingsBilling.supportActionHint: Continue with your connected Cardano wallet.

settingsBilling.autoRenewWalletNote: Auto-renew never charges your wallet automatically. It only uses Balance already added to your CAP account.

dropdown.paygComing: Pay-as-you-go debits from balance are coming next.
